meaning: n.[医]全血细胞减少症,各类血细胞减少
examples: Objective a report of a group of patients with pancytopenia which might be related to abnormal immunity.
In primary marrow disorders, more than one hematopoietic cell line is often decreased, resulting in pancytopenia.
Median and mean clinical follow-up for the idiopathic pancytopenia group was available for 444 and 739 days, respectively.
